prompt: I have a custom player search combobox in my dynasty app — it's a text input that filters a list of players as you type, and you can click a player to add them to your roster. Right now it's just a plain <input> and a <ul> that appears below it. A screen reader user told me it's completely unusable. How do I fix it?

assertions.text: Adds role='combobox' to the input or wrapping element
Includes aria-expanded to reflect open/closed state
Includes aria-controls pointing to the listbox
Adds role='listbox' to the results list
Adds role='option' to each result item
Mentions aria-activedescendant for tracking highlighted option
Covers keyboard pattern: arrows to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close
